upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tvAmeva kuravo vyaktaM pralamBante janArdana' (BA॰saBA॰37.28) pralamBante (=pralaBante)=vipralaBante=vaYcayante atrArTe 'gfDivaYcyoH pralamBane' (pA॰1.3.69) iti sUtraM mAnam

'mene pralabDamAtmAnaM kfzRenAmitraGAtinA' (BA॰ASva॰55.23)

'evaM pralabDA munayastAnUcuH kupitA nfpa' (BA॰pu॰11.1.16) idaM prapUrvasya laBeratisanDAnArTe prayogaprAcuryaM vyanakti pUrve munaya ekopasargapUrvasya prayogamarocayanta na tu viprAByAmupasfzwasya yaTA'dyatve

prayoga.literature_text: na ca tena vinA nidrAM laBate
na jAtu bAlA laBate sma nirvftim
diSo na jAne na laBe ca Sarma
parisftA deSA yAjYIyaM na laBe paSum
paYcASataM sutAn leBe jayA nAma parAn
tapovanaM gato rAma svargaM leBe tapoDanaH
laBeta vA prArTayitA na vA Sriyam
